text: Discussed on @Bloomberg Asia TV: As AI models, tools, and architectures become more open, AI adoption will accelerate worldwide. Security imperfections should be approached with caution as open technologies like OpenClaw and the ecosystems mature over time.

text: 01.AI is building enterprise AI agent business globally. Below are openings for Forward Deployed Engineer, Solutions Architect, AI Algorithm Expert, and Management Consultant.

Kai-Fu Lee explains how the future is about multi-agent systems. One agent today is like a pre-internet PC, useful but isolated. Connect agents, and they share context, split tasks, and coordinate instantly.
